sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Driven Brands’ chief legal officer O’Melia sells $750k in stock
feed.summary: Driven Brands Holdings Inc.'s Chief Legal Officer, Scott L. O’Melia, sold 46,875 shares of company stock for $750,000 on January 21, 2026. Despite the auto services company being unprofitable in the last year, analysts predict profitability this year, with earnings due on February 19, and the stock showing 9.18% year-to-date growth. InvestingPro suggests the stock is undervalued, with analyst price targets indicating potential upside.

feed.title: CRWV Investors Have Opportunity to Lead CoreWeave, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against CoreWeave, Inc. (NASDAQ: CRWV) for alleged securities fraud, encouraging investors who purchased securities between March 28, 2025, and December 15, 2025, to contact the firm. The lawsuit claims CoreWeave made false and misleading statements regarding its ability to meet customer demand and its reliance on a single third-party vendor for data centers, which was revealed through a failed acquisition and delayed data center operations. Investors are invited to join the case before March 13, 2026, to recover damages.

feed.title: CenterPoint Energy's 3,300-person expanded electric workforce pre-positioned at area staging sites and ready to mobilize ahead of late-night winter weather
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy has mobilized an expanded 3,300-person electric workforce and over 700 natural gas workers in anticipation of a major winter storm affecting Southeast Texas. The company has pre-positioned resources, activated its Emergency Operations Center, and implemented cold weather action plans to ensure a swift response to potential outages and service interruptions. Customers are urged to prepare for freezing temperatures, strong winds, and ice accumulation, and to enroll in Power Alert Service for updates.

feed.title: As Texas braces for ice, 3,300 workers stand by to keep Houston powered
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy has mobilized a 3,300-person electric workforce and 700 natural gas workers in preparation for an approaching winter storm in Southeast Texas. The company has pre-positioned equipment and staff at staging sites, particularly in the northeastern Greater Houston area, which is expected to be most impacted by ice. CenterPoint is also coordinating with state regulatory bodies and urging customers to prepare for freezing temperatures and potential outages.

feed.title: TJX Companies Stock: Quiet Retail Giant, Loud Market Returns
feed.summary: TJX Companies Inc. (TJX) has quietly outperformed the retail sector, leveraging its off-price model, global sourcing, and disciplined inventory management to deliver consistent market-beating returns. The company has shown robust performance over the past year, with its stock outpacing traditional department stores and broader market indices due to strong traffic, expanding margins, and strategic buying opportunities. Wall Street analysts are largely bullish on TJX, citing its defensive profile and unique ability to thrive in various economic conditions, with future growth expected from scale, international expansion, and careful digital integration.

feed.title: Cold Weather Prompts Xcel Energy To Suggest Smart Energy-saving Tips This Weekend
feed.summary: Xcel Energy is urging its customers in the Upper Midwest to conserve energy this weekend due to anticipated widespread cold temperatures and high energy demand. While Xcel has sufficient generation capacity, the Midcontinent Independent System Operator (MISO) forecasts strain on the larger regional grid. Customers are advised to take simple steps like adjusting thermostats, using natural light, and scheduling energy-intensive appliance use for off-peak hours to help reduce demand.

feed.title: PSCT ETF Jumped 23% Just by Holding Unknown, Small Cap Tech Stocks
feed.summary: The Invesco S&P SmallCap Information Technology ETF (PSCT) returned 23% over the past year by focusing on 75 small-cap tech companies. The fund's performance is attributed to the repricing of small-cap technology stocks as interest rates stabilize, benefiting companies in capital-intensive segments. However, its concentration in cyclical tech subsectors like crypto mining, exemplified by Marathon Digital, introduces volatility, necessitating careful monitoring of interest rate directions and portfolio rebalancing.

feed.title: New Era Energy & Digital inks key data center deal – ICYMI
feed.summary: New Era Energy & Digital (NASDAQ:NUAI) has announced a strategic partnership with Primary Digital Infrastructure to power next-generation data centers, aiming for up to one gigawatt of data center capacity. This collaboration leverages Primary Digital's experience in constructing large-scale data centers while New Era focuses on behind-the-meter power generation using natural gas. The company plans to deliver this capacity in phases, targeting hyperscale customers, with an estimated investment of $10 to $14 million per megawatt.

feed.title: Assessing Roper Technologies (ROP) Valuation After IntelliTrans DAT Freight Partnership And Earnings Growth Hopes
feed.summary: Roper Technologies (ROP) is under valuation scrutiny following its IntelliTrans unit's partnership with DAT Freight & Analytics and ahead of upcoming earnings, with the stock currently trading at a reported 37% intrinsic discount. Despite a 22.78% decline over the past year, its software-driven, recurring cash flow model, enhanced by AI and cloud solutions, suggests a fair value of $548.13 per share against its current $407.61. The company's recent strategic moves and expected earnings growth are seen as potential catalysts for its stock.

feed.title: How Investors Are Reacting To Mettler-Toledo International (MTD) Adding Ex-STERIS CFO To Its Board
feed.summary: Mettler-Toledo International (MTD) has appointed Michael J. Tokich, former CFO of STERIS plc, to its Board of Directors, a move aimed at enhancing financial leadership and capital allocation oversight. While Tokich's appointment adds valuable sector-specific financial expertise, the article suggests it's unlikely to significantly alter the company's core short-term earnings or demand catalysts. Investors are advised to consider the company's high debt load and valuation, alongside the diverse fair value estimates from private investors, before making investment decisions.

feed.title: Halliburton Eyes Venezuela Return As Undervalued Stock Faces New Growth Test
feed.summary: Halliburton (NYSE:HAL) is preparing for a potential return to Venezuela by soliciting resumes for technical and engineering roles, following U.S. government encouragement for American oil companies to invest there. This move could reconnect Halliburton with a major oil-producing country and impact its revenue and global footprint. While Simply Wall St flags the stock as undervalued, investors should consider execution risks, political stability, and how new contracts will affect financial metrics like debt and margins.

feed.title: Assessing Biogen (BIIB) Valuation After New EU Approval For High Dose Spinraza
feed.summary: The European Commission has approved a high-dose regimen of SPINRAZA for 5q spinal muscular atrophy, prompting a re-evaluation of Biogen's stock. Despite recent volatility, with a 14.48% return over 90 days but a 3.50% year-to-date decline, Biogen is currently trading at US$171.59 and is estimated to be 9.5% undervalued with a fair value of $189.66. The valuation is supported by a robust late-stage pipeline, though risks include underperformance of key launches and pricing pressures.

feed.title: Astec Industries Inc (ASTE) Stock Price Down 2.79% on Jan 23
feed.summary: Astec Industries Inc (ASTE) saw its stock price drop 2.79% on January 23, closing at $48.36, which is 5.03% below its 52-week high. Analysts have an average target price of $56.50, suggesting a 16.83% upside, with a "Buy" recommendation. However, GuruFocus's GF Value estimates a fair value of $44.19, indicating a potential downside of 8.62%.

feed.title: Assessing Public Storage (PSA) Valuation As Q4 Earnings Approach And Industry Conditions Remain Soft
feed.summary: Public Storage (PSA) is heading into its Q4 2025 earnings with expectations of modest FFO growth despite soft industry conditions. The stock is currently trading at an 8.65% discount to the average analyst target and an estimated 36.61% intrinsic discount, suggesting it is undervalued. Strategic portfolio expansion, including recent acquisitions and successful lease-ups, is expected to drive future revenue and NOI growth.

feed.title: The Truth About Yext Inc: Is This ‘AI Search’ Stock a Hidden Gem or Dead App Walking?
feed.summary: This article examines Yext Inc (YEXT), an AI search platform for businesses, and questions whether it's a valuable investment or a struggling tech company. It discusses Yext's core offering of AI-powered search for brands, its position in the competitive AI landscape against larger tech giants, and its volatile stock performance. The article concludes that Yext is a speculative bet for those interested in AI infrastructure and B2B SaaS turnaround stories, rather than a mainstream "must-have."

feed.title: The Truth About Delta Air Lines Inc.: Is This Airline Stock Secretly a Power Move?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Delta Air Lines Inc. (NYSE: DAL) stock, questioning if it's a solid investment despite its strong brand and social media presence. It highlights Delta's premium strategy, post-pandemic travel recovery, and robust financials, but also acknowledges industry risks like fuel prices and labor costs. The piece concludes that Delta is a strong long-term play for investors who can handle market volatility, positioning it as a balanced choice compared to its competitors.

feed.title: Booking Holdings Likely to Announce Stock Split, Market Cap at $164 Billion
feed.summary: Booking Holdings, with a market capitalization of $164 billion and a share price of over $5,000, is considered the most probable candidate for a stock split, which could attract more retail investors. While NVR and Seaboard are also high-priced stocks, NVR has historically avoided splits, and Seaboard's volatility makes a split risky during economic downturns. Analysts have a positive outlook for Booking Holdings, with an average 1-year price target of $6,153, indicating potential for stock price appreciation.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Fermi Inc. Investors with Substantial Losses Have Opportunity to Lead Class Action Lawsuit, Robbins Geller Rudman & Dowd LLP Announces
feed.summary: Robbins Geller Rudman & Dowd LLP has announced a class action lawsuit against Fermi Inc. (NASDAQ: FRMI) for investors who suffered substantial losses. The lawsuit alleges that Fermi made false or misleading statements in its IPO documents concerning tenant demand for its Project Matador campus and the reliance on a single tenant's funding, which was later terminated. Investors who purchased Fermi stock during the Class Period (October 1, 2025 – December 11, 2025) have until March 6, 2026, to seek appointment as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Granite Point Mortgage: I'm Adding To My High-Yield Preferred Stock Position
feed.summary: Granite Point Mortgage Trust is showing signs of operational recovery, with improved net interest income and a de-risked balance sheet. The author recommends the Series A preferred shares (GPMT.PR.A) due to their attractive yield and potential reset to 11.6% if SOFR remains high, while rating the common shares as a speculative buy. The company specializes in originating and investing in floating-rate commercial mortgage loans.

feed.title: A Look At AvalonBay Communities (AVB) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
feed.summary: AvalonBay Communities (AVB) has experienced recent share price weakness, with a 13.75% decline over the past year, prompting investors to re-evaluate its valuation. Despite this, the stock shows stronger long-term returns and is considered undervalued by analysts, with a fair value of $203.40 against its current price of $178.77. This valuation is supported by expectations of alleviated competitive pressures and higher margins in its core markets due to low new multifamily supply.

feed.title: Edgewise Therapeutics(EWTX.US) Director Sells US$3.4 Million in Common Stock
feed.summary: Edris Badreddin, a director at Edgewise Therapeutics (EWTX.US), sold 115,470 shares of common stock on January 21, 2026. The transaction was valued at approximately $3.4 million, with shares sold at an average price of $29.44. This sale is a required disclosure under federal securities laws for company insiders.

feed.title: Meta 'Peak Pressure' Priced In As Valuation Gap With Alphabet Narrows, Analyst Sees Nearly 40% Upside
feed.summary: An analyst identifies Meta Platforms Inc. as a potential buying opportunity, citing its current discount compared to Alphabet Inc. and the anticipated impact of Meta's new AI model in narrowing the valuation gap. Despite recent stock drops due to AI infrastructure spending concerns, the analyst believes "peak pressure" is priced in and sees nearly 40% upside, supported by Meta's cost controls, ad optimization, and WhatsApp's growth potential. Additionally, Meta's Threads app shows strong user growth, suggesting positive future performance.

feed.title: SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust Sees Weekly Outflows Amid Tech Volatility
feed.summary: The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY) experienced a 0.35% drop and $9.26 billion in net outflows over the past week, partly due to volatility in its major tech holdings. Nvidia, despite short-term fluctuations, maintains a Strong Buy rating due to strong AI demand, while Apple, heading into Q1 2026 earnings, shows robust iPhone demand and services growth, earning it a Moderate Buy. Microsoft is poised for strong Q2 2026 results, driven by AI and Azure, leading to a Strong Buy rating despite recent valuation concerns.

feed.title: Will Agilent’s AI-Enabled Digital Pathology Push Reshape Agilent Technologies' (A) Diagnostics Narrative?
feed.summary: Agilent Technologies has launched the Agilent S540MD Slide Scanner System, which features AI-assisted tissue detection and is now available in European markets. This move extends Agilent's role in the pathology value chain, although it is not expected to significantly impact near-term results. The company's investment narrative is built on its position as a "picks-and-shovels" provider in life sciences and diagnostics, with steady growth and high-quality earnings.

feed.title: AutoZone Stock: Can This Relentless Buyback Machine Keep Beating The Market?
feed.summary: AutoZone has continued its market outperformance, driven by aggressive share buybacks and consistent demand for auto parts due to an aging vehicle fleet. Despite the stock trading near record highs, analysts remain largely bullish, citing the company's strong cash flow, effective capital allocation strategy, and resilient business model. The company's focus on the commercial market and improving operational efficiencies are expected to sustain its growth, making it a compelling long-term investment.

feed.title: Dem-Backed ICE Body Cams Are a Giveaway to Weapons Makers
feed.summary: Democratic legislators are proposing body cameras for ICE agents to reduce misconduct, but the article argues this is a windfall for weapons technology companies like Axon Enterprise, Inc., with little evidence of efficacy. Axon has lobbied extensively for the $20 million allocated for body cameras in the Department of Homeland Security spending bill, despite facing lawsuits for monopolizing the market and raising prices. Critics suggest the bill primarily benefits contractors and does little to address accountability or curb ICE's actions.

feed.title: Roundhill GOOGL WeeklyPay ETF To Go Ex-Dividend On January 26th, 2026 With 0.50146 USD Dividend Per Share
feed.summary: The Roundhill GOOGL WeeklyPay ETF (GOOW.US) is scheduled to go ex-dividend on January 26th, 2026. Shareholders of record on this date will receive a cash dividend of $0.50146 per share, which will be paid out on January 27th, 2026. The article also provides general information on the differences between cash and stock dividends.

feed.title: A Look At OFG Bancorp (OFG) Valuation After A Mixed Fourth Quarter Earnings Reaction
feed.summary: OFG Bancorp (OFG) reported mixed Q4 2025 results, beating EPS but showing weaker profitability, leading to a stock sell-off despite loan growth and digital banking expansion. The stock is currently trading at $37.15, below the analyst target of $44.40, with a prevailing narrative suggesting it is 22% undervalued with a fair value of $47.60, based on assumptions of digital banking driving efficiency and margin improvement. Investors are encouraged to consider the intrinsic value and potential risks, such as economic stability in Puerto Rico and funding reliability.

feed.title: Oxbow Advisors LLC Lowers Holdings in Frontline PLC $FRO
feed.summary: Oxbow Advisors LLC significantly reduced its stake in Frontline PLC by 46.4% in the third quarter, selling 181,293 shares. Despite this, other institutions like Marshall Wace and SG Americas increased their holdings, with hedge funds and institutional investors now owning about 22.7% of the company. Analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $24.62, while the stock currently trades near $26.10 and offers an annualized dividend yield of 2.9%.

feed.title: NUTANIX INVESTIGATION ALERT: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. is
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. is investigating potential claims against Nutanix, Inc. (NASDAQ: NTNX) following a significant drop in its stock price. The investigation stems from Nutanix's revised full-year revenue projection after its Q1 fiscal 2026 results fell short of guidance, which led to an approximate 17.8% decline in share value. The law firm is encouraging Nutanix stockholders who suffered losses to contact them to discuss legal options.

feed.title: Oxbow Advisors LLC Purchases Shares of 22,802 Ingredion Incorporated $INGR
feed.summary: Oxbow Advisors LLC has acquired 22,802 shares of Ingredion Incorporated (NYSE:INGR) in the third quarter, valuing this new position at approximately $2.78 million. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their stakes, contributing to institutional ownership of 85.27% for the company. Ingredion reported mixed Q3 results, beating EPS estimates but missing on revenue, and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.82 per share.

feed.title: CRDF - Trovagene Presents Outlook for Second Half of 2018
feed.summary: Trovagene (NASDAQ: TROV), an oncology therapeutics company, provided an outlook for the second half of 2018, emphasizing progress in two key clinical trials for PCM-075 targeting Acute Myeloid Leukemia (AML) and metastatic Castration-Resistant Prostate Cancer (mCRPC). The company highlighted significant achievements in the first half of 2018, including encouraging preliminary clinical data and progress in trial enrollments. Trovagene aims to complete dose escalation, present safety/efficacy data, and initiate Phase 2 segments of its AML trial, while also evaluating strategic partnerships and searching for a new CEO.

feed.title: NB Bancorp To Go Ex-Dividend On February 5th, 2026 With 0.07 USD Dividend Per Share
feed.summary: NB Bancorp (NBBK.US) will trade ex-dividend on February 5th, 2026, with a dividend of $0.07 per share. Shareholders of record on that date will receive the dividend on February 19th, 2026. The article also provides general definitions of cash and stock dividends.

feed.title: Oxbow Advisors LLC Takes $5.09 Million Position in Gildan Activewear, Inc. $GIL

Other institutional investors also modified their holdings, with institutional ownership reaching 82.83%. Analysts currently rate Gildan Activewear as a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $74.46, following mixed analyst upgrades and downgrades.

feed.title: Oxbow Advisors LLC Buys 42,267 Shares of Colgate-Palmolive Company $CL
feed.summary: Oxbow Advisors LLC significantly increased its stake in Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE:CL) by 133.3% in the third quarter, purchasing an additional 42,267 shares to bring its total holdings to 73,986 shares valued at $5.914 million. This move comes as analyst sentiment remains largely positive, with 11 analysts rating CL a "Buy" and five a "Hold," projecting an average target price of $89.44. Colgate-Palmolive also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.52 per share, yielding approximately 2.4% annually.

feed.title: Costco stock (COST) ends Friday higher; what to watch before the next U.S. session
feed.summary: Costco (COST) shares closed Friday 0.7% higher at $983.25, just under the $1,000 mark. Investors are looking forward to several key dates, including a dividend record date on January 30, the release of January sales figures on February 4, and the fiscal second-quarter earnings call on March 5. Additionally, the company faces a new class-action lawsuit regarding "no preservatives" claims on its rotisserie chicken products.

feed.title: Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) Stock Price Expected to Rise, Raymond James Financial Analyst Says
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial has raised its price target for Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) to $175 from $160, maintaining an "outperform" rating, which suggests a potential 23.7% upside. This bullish outlook comes despite a MarketBeat consensus of "Hold" with an average price target of $153.53. Phillips 66 recently surpassed quarterly EPS estimates but has seen net selling from insiders, including its CFO and EVP, totaling approximately 86,094 shares over the past 90 days.

feed.title: Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) Price Target Raised to $164.00 at The Goldman Sachs Group
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs Group has raised its price target for Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) to $164.00, up from $152.00, while maintaining a "neutral" rating on the stock. This new target implies a potential upside of 15.90% from the previous closing price. Despite the upgraded price target, the consensus among analysts remains a "Hold" with an average target of $153.53, and recent insider selling has been noted, including the CFO selling 30,000 shares.

feed.title: Wolfe Research Cuts Occidental Petroleum (NYSE:OXY) Price Target to $54.00
feed.summary: Wolfe Research has lowered its price target for Occidental Petroleum (NYSE:OXY) to $54.00 from $55.00 but maintained an "outperform" rating, indicating a potential 22.37% upside. Analyst opinions on OXY are mixed, with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average target of $47.57, despite some recent upgrades and downgrades from various firms. The article also highlights recent insider buying activity and significant institutional ownership in the company.

feed.title: Occidental Petroleum (NYSE:OXY) Price Target Lowered to $41.00 at The Goldman Sachs Group

Despite this, other analysts have boosted their price targets, and the stock is largely rated as "Hold" with an average target of $47.57. feed.title: Raymond James Financial Issues Positive Forecast for Marathon Petroleum (NYSE:MPC) Stock Price

Marathon Petroleum recently beat quarterly earnings and revenue expectations, and the stock is currently trading around $175.39.

feed.title: Live Nation Entertainment (NYSE:LYV) Given New $180.00 Price Target at Moffett Nathanson
feed.summary: Moffett Nathanson has trimmed its price target for Live Nation Entertainment (NYSE:LYV) from $185.00 to $180.00, while maintaining a "buy" rating, indicating a potential upside of 22.39%. This comes despite a recent quarterly earnings miss, with the company reporting $0.73 EPS against an expected $1.54 and revenue of $8.50 billion against an $8.87 billion estimate. Live Nation stock rose 6.5% on heavy volume, with institutional investors showing increased interest in the company.

(NASDAQ:INTU) in the third quarter, valued at approximately $5.91 million, contributing to the 83.66% institutional ownership of the company. The company reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates, and trading at $563.97 with a market cap of $156.94 billion, though insider selling by executives has been noted.

feed.title: Oxbow Advisors LLC Takes $2.95 Million Position in Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. $REGN

(NASDAQ:REGN) by purchasing 5,247 shares valued at approximately $2.95 million during the third quarter. feed.title: Jim Cramer Discusses D.R. Horton (DHI) In Context of Interest Rates
feed.summary: Jim Cramer discussed D.R. Horton (DHI) in the context of interest rates, noting that a decrease in rates would make the homebuilder's stock attractive again despite its current inexpensive valuation. The article highlights D.R. Horton's strong fiscal first-quarter earnings, significant share price gains, and positive analyst revisions. Meridian Hedged Equity Fund also praised D.R. Horton for its focus on affordable homes and operational efficiency in a challenging market.

feed.title: Is Fabrinet’s (FN) Nvidia Partnership Quietly Redefining Its Role in the Data Center Stack?
feed.summary: Fabrinet (FN) is set to release its Q2 fiscal 2026 results soon, with recent analyst upgrades highlighting its crucial role as an Nvidia supplier and its exposure to growing optical networking and 1.6T data center demand. While this partnership fortifies Fabrinet's investment narrative, it also intensifies focus on its near-term revenue guidance of US$1.05–1.10 billion and poses concentration risk due to its reliance on a few large customers. Investors are advised to consider the demanding valuation and potential for quick sentiment shifts given high expectations around AI-driven optical demand.

feed.title: Gencor Sets 2026 Annual Meeting and Governance Deadlines
feed.summary: Gencor Industries has announced the scheduling of its Annual Meeting of Stockholders for April 3, 2026, for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2025. Due to the later date, the company has updated its key governance timelines, setting February 26, 2026, as the record date and February 2, 2026, as the deadline for shareholder proposals and director nominations. A recent analyst rating on GENC stock is a Buy with a $15.50 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates GENC as Neutral, noting strong financial quality but weak cash flow consistency.

feed.title: Trek Financial LLC Buys New Stake in CoStar Group, Inc. $CSGP
feed.summary: Trek Financial LLC has acquired a new stake of 45,221 shares in CoStar Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:CSGP), valued at approximately $3.815 million, bringing institutional ownership to 96.60%. The company recently announced a $1.50 billion share repurchase program and exceeded Q3 earnings estimates. Analysts' consensus is a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $83.59.

feed.title: Trek Financial LLC Invests $3.58 Million in GE Vernova Inc. $GEV
feed.summary: Trek Financial LLC has invested $3.58 million in GE Vernova Inc. (NYSE:GEV) by acquiring 5,819 shares in the third quarter. Other institutions, such as Nordea Investment Management AB and Rakuten Investment Management Inc., also significantly increased their stakes. GE Vernova reported Q3 EPS of $1.64, missing estimates, but exceeded revenue expectations with $9.97 billion, an 11.8% year-over-year increase, and raised its quarterly dividend to $0.50.
